title: Hidden Patterns
description: Looking at patterns in data to surface hidden insights.
content: Data analysis reveals unexpected connections. Serendipity often guides the best research discoveries when you stop forcing the outcome.

title: Serendipity in Everyday Life
description: An essay on unexpected discoveries and happy accidents.
content: Serendipity visits us when we least expect it. Happy accidents shape our lives.

title: Simple Pasta Recipe
description: A quick recipe for weeknight pasta.
content: Boil water, add pasta, drain, add sauce, and serve. Cooking pasta is easy.

title: Live Music Experiences
description: Short notes on live concerts attended.
content: Live music is unlike any recording. The energy is unmatched by speakers.

title: Travel Reflections
description: Thoughts on recent travels to new places.
content: Traveling opens the mind to new perspectives and fresh ideas.

title: Software Project
description: A project built with modern web technology.
content: This project uses modern web technology to solve a real problem in data visualization.

title: Music Notes
description: Notes on albums I have been enjoying lately.
content: Music has been central to my listening life recently.

title: My Favorite Foods
description: A list of foods I love cooking at home.
content: Food is one of life's great pleasures. Cooking brings joy and nourishment.

title: On Caring Deeply
description: Exploring the nature of deep emotional investment.
content: Caring deeply about things gives life meaning and purpose.

title: Beer Notes
description: Tasting notes from my beer explorations.
content: Beer comes in many styles. Each brewery brings its own character to the craft.
